evals.prompt: Write a PRD for a feature that lets users of our B2B SaaS platform invite teammates to their workspace. The invitee gets an email, clicks a link, and joins the workspace. Admins can manage (revoke) pending invites.
evals.expected_output: A complete PRD markdown document with problem statement, goals and success metrics table, target user personas, in-scope and out-of-scope sections, numbered functional requirements, and open questions.
expectations: Output is a markdown document starting with a level-1 heading containing 'PRD'
Document includes a 'Goals & Success Metrics' section with at least one measurable metric
Document includes at least two distinct user personas or user types
Document includes both 'In Scope' and 'Out of Scope' sections
Document includes numbered functional requirements (at least 5)
Document includes an 'Open Questions' section with at least one item

evals.prompt: I need a PRD for adding dark mode to our web app. Our users are designers and developers who work long hours. We want to reduce eye strain and improve retention.
evals.expected_output: A PRD covering the dark mode feature for a design/developer tool, with user-centric metrics, scope definition, and functional requirements for the dark mode implementation.
expectations: Output is a markdown PRD document
Problem statement mentions eye strain or extended usage context
Success metrics include at least one quantifiable target
Document specifies which UI surfaces are in scope for dark mode
Functional requirements include user preference persistence and system/browser detection

evals.prompt: Write a PRD for a mobile app that helps restaurant owners track food inventory and get low-stock alerts.
evals.expected_output: A PRD for a mobile inventory management app targeting restaurant owners, with personas, goals, requirements for inventory tracking and alert features.
expectations: Output is a markdown PRD document
Includes a restaurant owner or operations manager persona
Goals section references inventory waste reduction or cost savings or stockout prevention
Functional requirements cover both inventory tracking and alert/notification functionality
Document distinguishes what's in scope vs out of scope
